title: Occupiers' liability
summary: 9084 Tort — OLA 1957 visitors, OLA 1984 trespassers, common duty of care.
learningObjectives: Define occupier, premises, and visitor under OLA 1957.
Explain common duty of care and s2(3) factors.
Apply cases: Wheat v Lacon, Roles v Nathan.

simpleExplanation.title: Safety on someone else's property
simpleExplanation.summary: Occupiers owe visitors a duty to take reasonable care for their safety — lower duties apply to trespassers under the 1984 Act.
steps: Trespassers — OLA 1984, aware of danger + may suffer.
